title: Salary deferral arrangements - Canada.ca
content:
## Salary deferral arrangements
A salary deferral is a plan or arrangement made between an employee and an employer. Under such an arrangement, an employee postpones receiving salary and wages to a later year. The amount postponed is called "deferred amount."

## Services and information
- Prescribed salary deferral plans or arrangements
- Salary deferral arrangements other than prescribed plans
- Reporting salary deferral plans or arrangements amounts

## Forms and publications
- Guide T4001, Employers' Guide – Payroll Deductions and Remittances
- Guide RC4120, Employers' Guide – Filing the T4 Slip and Summary

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
